summary: Iteration 5 - Admin CRUD, Owner Analytics, RBAC Testing Complete. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages working correctly. Admin user CRUD, shop management, subscription plans, platform stats all functional. Owner financial analysis, stock alerts, sales by seller/product working. Product returns page renders without errors. RBAC correctly filters sidebar menus based on role.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin and owner features verified working. Admin user CRUD, shop management, subscription plans, platform stats all functional. Owner financial analysis, stock alerts, sales analytics working. RBAC correctly filters sidebar menus and API access. 3 users exist: super_admin, ceo, owner. 3 shops exist. 3 subscription plans seeded.
